title: senecio sumatranus
intro: Senecio sumatranus, also known as Fireweed or Resurrection Plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Senecio sumatranus include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, with the leaves and flowers being the most commonly used parts.
